structured.title: Crew Debates Crick's Legacy Lead
structured.overview: The crew discusses intelligence gathered through an undercover operation and a possible lead tied to Jasper Crick’s legacy. They worry Delgado may have uncovered something real, despite no database record of a GalBank transport named "the legacy." The group decides not to rush to New Atlanta and instead continue monitoring the situation through their agent, since the Crimson Fleet could cause major damage if they get hold of a large shipment of credits. The conversation also emphasizes how a small rumor can grow into something much larger.
